entities.girl: a girl walking on the path
entities.cat: a gray cat in the grass

scenes.title: The Garden Path
scenes.background_prompt: A cottage garden path with stone pavers, mixed flower beds, a wooden gate, and a stone wall covered in ivy. Warm afternoon. No people, no animals, no sunflowers.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A cottage garden on a warm afternoon. A winding stone path leads through mixed flower beds toward a wooden gate in a stone wall covered in ivy. Along the left edge of the path, a single towering bright yellow sunflower stands out dramatically, its large golden head turned toward the sun, its broad green leaves spread wide, vibrant among the muted purples and whites of lavender and daisies surrounding it. A girl of about nine in a white sundress and sandals walks along the path toward the gate, pausing to look at the sunflower. A gray cat sits in the grass to the right of the path, watching a butterfly lazily. Warm golden light bathes the entire garden.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place sunflower along the left edge of the path, towering and bright yellow, head turned toward the sun. Place girl on the path (center-right), walking toward the gate and pausing to look at the sunflower. Place cat in the grass to the right, sitting and watching a butterfly.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom-left foreground, a variety of small yellow, white, and purple flowers grow amidst lush green grass and clover. A path composed of irregular, flat grey stepping stones begins in this area and winds across the center toward the right side of the frame. In the bottom-right foreground, more white daisies and small purple blossoms are scattered throughout the grass. Moving to the midground on the far left, a dense cluster of garden plants features tall brown seed heads, spires of blue bell-shaped flowers, and small yellow blossoms. Standing prominently behind these plants is a large sunflower with a dark brown textured center and vibrant yellow petals, supported by a thick green stalk with broad, pointed leaves. To the right of the sunflower, a low stone wall is heavily draped in green ivy. In the center of the scene, a young girl with brown hair tied in pigtails with yellow ribbons walks to the right along the stone path. She wears a long-sleeved green sweater, a yellow skirt with a small brown floral pattern, white socks with blue stripes, and brown shoes. She carries a brown backpack and is looking back toward the sunflower. Directly behind her is a closed wooden garden gate with a rounded top, integrated into the ivy-covered stone wall. To the right of the gate, a rose bush with yellow flowers grows against the wall. Further right, a grey cat sits on the grass, looking upward at a small pink and blue butterfly fluttering near a large, rounded green bush. In the background, large green trees with thick brown trunks frame the scene on both the left and right sides. Rolling green hills are visible in the distance behind the garden wall. The sky above is a pale blue, filled with soft, white, rounded clouds, illuminated by the warm, golden light of a low sun, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon.
